name: Pear and Blue Cheese Pizza
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces double-cream blue cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Spread the blue cheese on the pizza crusts.
3. Core the pears and cut them lengthwise into thin slices.
4. Arrange the slices of pear on top of the cheese.
5. Drizzle with the honey and sprinkle half a teaspoon of thyme over each pizza.
6. Bake the tarts on the bottom rack of the oven for about 8 minutes, until heated through.
7. Place under the broiler for 1 to 2 minutes longer to brown the pears lightly.
8. Cut each tart into 8 wedges and serve warm. Makes 4-5 servings.
